arts.ttl: John Elkann expresses full confidence in Thiago Motta ahead of Turin derby
arts.sum: As Juventus prepare for the highly anticipated Turin derby against Torino, John Elkann, the president of the Agnelli Foundation, CEO of Stellantis, and majority shareholder of Juventus, has voiced his unwavering support for the team and its manager, Thiago Motta. Speaking from Beijing, where he attended the inauguration of the Agnelli Chair of Italian Culture at Peking University alongside Italian President Sergio Mattarella, Elkann took the opportunity to send an encouraging message to the Juventus squad. “Derbies are always challenging, but the team is coming together well. I have full confidence in Thiago Motta; he has really taken charge of The post John Elkann expresses full confidence in Thiago Motta ahead of Turin derby appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Totti Reflects on Friendship with Del Piero as Juventus Legend Turns 50
arts.sum: Francesco Totti, the iconic Roma captain, recently gave an extensive interview to celebrate Alessandro Del Piero’s 50th birthday. The two Italian football legends, once seen as rivals, have maintained a strong friendship throughout their careers and beyond. Totti began by expressing his disbelief at Del Piero’s milestone: “It seems hard to believe. Fifty years. It feels like yesterday we were two eighteen, twenty-year-old boys. Far apart, mind you: he was winning league titles, playing in the Champions Cup. Me… well, it took me a bit longer. But we watched each other, studied each other, maybe even sought each other out, The post Totti Reflects on Friendship with Del Piero as Juventus Legend Turns 50 appeared first on FootItalia.com.
